name: 02_macbook_pro
description: Candidate joins as 'MacBook Pro' (device name). Name signal is useless; self-introduction in the transcript plus Q/A structure must carry identification.

data.text: Hi! Thanks for joining. Before we start, could you introduce yourself?
Hi, sure. I'm Sagar, currently working as an SDE at a fintech in Pune. My role is mostly on the ledger side — I built the double entry posting engine we use for settlements.
Nice to meet you Sagar, I'm Vikram, I lead the infra team. Tell me about a hard production incident you handled?

In my previous role we had a cascading failure when a downstream API slowed down. I was responsible for the mitigation — I implemented circuit breakers and added load shedding at the gateway, which brought error rates down within the hour.
How would you design rate limiting for a multi-tenant API?

I'd start with a token bucket per tenant in Redis, then talk about hot key mitigation. I designed something similar for our public API, so I can walk through the trade-offs between accuracy and latency.
